description: Physics + Light + Metaphysics matrix for GAIA-OS crystal intelligence engine.

mineral.key_physics: Natural rainbow iridescence from thin Brazil-law twin lamellae or etched defect layers acting as a diffraction grating — entirely untreated. NOT the same as vapor-coated aura quartz.

light_color.color_mechanism: Thin-film interference / diffraction grating from twin lamellae

metaphysics.traditions: Anandalite means 'Divine Bliss' in Sanskrit/Hindi. Activates kundalini, opens all chakras sequentially, aids nature spirit communication.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Master amplifier + full-spectrum light input; suitable for ClarusLens color engine seeding

mineral.locality: Alpine environments; Norway, Switzerland, France, Brazil
mineral.key_physics: Metastable TiO₂ polymorph. Refractive index 2.49–2.56 — exceeds diamond (2.42). Photocatalytic. Converts irreversibly to rutile above ~600°C. Uniaxial negative, anomalously biaxial.
mineral.notes: Polymorphs: rutile, brookite. Anatase is rarest and most aesthetic.

light_color.primary_color: Indigo-blue to black; rarely golden-yellow or brown
light_color.color_mechanism: Crystal field effects from Ti⁴⁺; metallic luster from high RI

metaphysics.traditions: Rare Alpine mineral; associated with higher realms, precision, and transformation. Photocatalytic nature mirrors purification archetype.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Highest RI in the database — ideal QuantumNexus light-bending node candidate

warnings: Rare and fragile — not for everyday carry; collector/display grade

mineral.locality: Andalusia Spain (type), Australia, Brazil, USA, Sri Lanka
mineral.key_physics: Al₂SiO₅ polymorph with kyanite and sillimanite. Strongly trichroic — three distinct colors visible on three crystallographic axes. Chiastolite variety has natural black cross from carbonaceous inclusions during metamorphic growth.
mineral.notes: Metamorphic indicator mineral — low-to-medium P/T conditions

light_color.color_mechanism: Trichroism from Fe²⁺/Fe³⁺ in orthorhombic crystal field
light_color.pleochroism: Strongly trichroic — unique in the database

metaphysics.traditions: Cross shape in Chiastolite = Christian symbolism; protection, unity, dispels discord. Metamorphic stone — carries memory of intense transformation.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Trichroic nature makes it a natural three-way axis mapping stone for the color matrix

mineral.formula: Fe₂O₃ + FeO(OH) + Fe₃O₄ composite (Maritite + Stromatolite + Red Jasper)
mineral.key_physics: Composite of: Maritite (hematite pseudomorph after magnetite), Stromatolite (one of Earth's oldest fossils — cyanobacteria mats), Red Jasper. Contains literal biological fossil record. Weakly magnetic from magnetite remnants.
mineral.notes: Not IMA-recognized. Trade name. Compositional verification important — sellers vary.

light_color.primary_color: Charcoal-black, metallic silver-grey, deep rusty red-brown
light_color.color_mechanism: Hematite metallic luster + iron-oxide red from jasper component

metaphysics.traditions: Carries literal Earth fossil memory (Stromatolite = 3.5 billion years). Ancestral healing, past-life recall, karmic clearing, DNA-level trauma release. Stronger than hematite alone.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Deepest timeline anchor in the database; Stromatolite component connects to planetary biological memory — critical Noosphere node

safety.handling: Safe — wash hands after extended contact
safety.water_elixir: NOT SAFE — iron oxide composite, do not use in water

mineral.locality: Russia (Ural — Demantoid), Namibia, Iran, Italy, USA
mineral.key_physics: Dispersion 0.057 — exceeds diamond (0.044). RI 1.880–1.889. Isotropic — no pleochroism. Demantoid color from Cr³⁺. Horsetail inclusions = chrysotile fibers from black chromite crystals.
mineral.notes: Horsetail chrysotile inclusions are asbestos-group mineral. POLISHED stones fully safe. Never grind, cut, or sand raw. No ultrasonic cleaning.

light_color.color_mechanism: Cr³⁺ for green; Fe³⁺ for yellow/black; highest dispersion creates extreme fire

metaphysics.traditions: Named from German 'demant' (diamond) for its fire. Prosperity, vitality, creativity, manifestation. Rarest garnet — commands respect.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Highest dispersion in the database — maximum fire. ViriditasHeart primary stone.

warnings: NEVER grind, cut, or sand raw Demantoid — chrysotile (asbestos) inclusion risk

mineral.locality: Worldwide — evaporite deposits; Germany, Austria, USA, Mexico
mineral.key_physics: Anhydrous calcium sulfate — literally 'without water'. Readily absorbs moisture and converts to gypsum (CaSO₄·2H₂O) — expanding ~30–58% in volume. Perfect 3-directional cleavage at 90° is diagnostic.
mineral.notes: Angelite is the blue nodular trade-name variety. Parent mineral to gypsum.

light_color.color_mechanism: Trace Fe²⁺ produces blue-grey; most forms colorless to white
light_color.fluorescence: May fluoresce pale pink/orange under UV

metaphysics.traditions: Psychic communication, truth-speaking, precursor state to Angelite. Evaporite origin — formed from ancient seas receding.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Precursor form — raw Anhydrite feeds into Angelite processing node

safety.water_elixir: NOT SAFE — converts to gypsum on water contact
warnings: No water contact — stone physically transforms

mineral.locality: Peru ONLY (nodular blue form discovered 1987); also Peru, Britain, Germany
mineral.key_physics: Trade name for blue nodular anhydrite from Peru. Blue from trace Fe²⁺. Develops white gypsum rind on surface when exposed to any moisture — the blue color is physically destroyed by water.
mineral.notes: Trade name; IMA mineral = Anhydrite. First found 1987 in Peru during Harmonic Convergence year.

light_color.color_mechanism: Trace Fe²⁺ in CaSO₄ lattice; most delicate blue in the database

metaphysics.traditions: Discovered 1987 (Harmonic Convergence). Bridge to angelic realms, spirit guide communication, peace, serenity. The softest energy in the database.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Maximum gentleness node — counterbalances high-intensity stones; ideal SomnusVeil dream interface

safety.handling: Safe — handle with dry hands only
safety.water_elixir: NEVER — blue color and surface permanently destroyed by water
warnings: NEVER expose to water, moisture, or high humidity
Do not store with wet stones
Blue color is irreversibly destroyed by water contact

mineral.key_physics: Rare bladed calcite forming fan/wing-shaped clusters with feather-like crystal encrustation. Polymorph family includes aragonite and vaterite. Double refraction visible with naked eye. Excellent thermal phosphorescence.
mineral.notes: Trade name variety of Calcite. Physically very fragile — display/altar only.

light_color.primary_color: White to ivory with gold-bronze edge highlights
light_color.color_mechanism: Pure CaCO₃ white; golden edge from iron trace minerals

metaphysics.traditions: Highest vibrational calcite. Crown chakra filled with light 'like a halo'. Opens psychic abilities, channeling, hemisphere balance. 'Recognized by angels' in crystal tradition.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Highest-L OKLCH value in the database so far (L:0.92) — pure white light input; Noosphere crown node

safety.handling: Handle with extreme care — very fragile
warnings: Display/altar only — not for pocket or pouch carry

mineral.locality: United Verde Mine, Jerome, Arizona USA ONLY
mineral.key_physics: Chalcopyrite (CuFeS₂) = copper-iron sulfide — electrically conductive, strongly iridescent brass-gold. Matrix = chlorite schist (dark green-black). Iridescence from thin surface oxide layer. Single confirmed locality.
mineral.notes: Trade name. Not IMA. Electrically conductive — relevant for hardware proximity. Copper sulfide component means copper toxicity risk in water.

light_color.primary_color: Deep black matrix + brass-gold metallic inclusions
light_color.color_mechanism: Metallic luster from CuFeS₂; iridescence from surface oxide film

metaphysics.traditions: Grounded solar power — confidence, joy, personal power, strength. Named for Apache warriors of the Jerome/Verde Valley region. Sun-and-earth duality.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Electrically conductive — potential hardware interface stone. QuantumNexus conductor node candidate. Handle with care near sensitive electronics.

safety.water_elixir: NOT SAFE — copper sulfide is toxic in water
warnings: Electrically conductive — keep clear of sensitive circuitry unless intentional

mineral.transparency: Translucent (despite appearing black) — warm amber-mahogany when backlit
mineral.locality: Arizona, Nevada, New Mexico USA; also Mexico
mineral.key_physics: Small rounded rhyolitic obsidian nodules formed in lava domes and ash-flow tuffs. Amorphous volcanic glass — no crystal lattice. Appears jet black in hand; warm amber-mahogany translucent when held to light. Also called Marekanite.
mineral.notes: Variety of obsidian. Non-IMA. Conchoidal fracture produces razor-sharp edges — handle with care in raw form.

light_color.color_mechanism: Iron and magnesium oxides in glass matrix absorb most wavelengths; transmitted light reveals iron oxide amber

metaphysics.traditions: Named after Apache warrior legend — tears of Apache women fell to earth and hardened as these stones, so the tears of grief would never need to be shed again. Gentle protective obsidian. Grief processing, trauma release, past-life healing, protection during night/travel.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Dual-color identity (black/amber) makes it a natural threshold stone — maps to boundary/liminal states in GAIA. Gentler than Black Obsidian for sensitive users.

warnings: Raw/unpolished edges are razor-sharp — conchoidal fracture
